name: Intellectual Property Ownership — Work For Hire
text: All Intellectual Property Rights in and to the Deliverables, including but not limited to inventions, discoveries, developments, improvements, works of authorship, data, databases, processes, methods, know-how, trade secrets, and any other proprietary information created, developed, conceived, or reduced to practice by the Service Provider (whether solely or jointly with others) in the course of or arising out of this Agreement, shall vest absolutely and exclusively in the Client upon creation. The Service Provider hereby assigns to the Client, by way of future assignment, all such Intellectual Property Rights with full title guarantee. The Service Provider agrees to execute all such documents and do all such acts as the Client may reasonably require to perfect the assignment contemplated herein.

legal_basis.note: Work made in course of employment — employer owns copyright
Assignment of copyright — must be in writing, signed
Assignment of patent — must be in writing
Data protection relevant to software IP

invalid_if: Rights limited to licence rather than full assignment where assignment is intended
Future works not covered by present assignment
title: Intellectual Property Ownership
dispute_hotspots: Background vs foreground IP boundary disputes — undocumented pre-existing code
Copyright Act S.17 — independent contractor NOT treated as employee; unlike employment, IP does NOT auto-vest in client without express assignment
Open source contamination — GPL code embedded in proprietary deliverable
Moral rights in India — cannot be fully waived, artist can object to distortion
